coordinate_frame.description: For spatial channels: the coordinate frame the values are expressed in.
coordinate_frame.title: Coordinate Frame

name.description: Channel name as it appears in the payload (e.g. `t`, `x`, `y`, `Fp1`).
name.title: Name

unit.description: Unit of the channel's values (e.g. `s`, `px`, `uV`). Omit for unitless channels.
unit.title: Unit

CoordinateFrameEnum.description: Coordinate frame of a spatial channel, mirroring the trial Input table's x_screen/x_viewport distinction.
CoordinateFrameEnum.title: CoordinateFrameEnum

SamplingNatureEnum.description: How samples are generated in time.
SamplingNatureEnum.title: SamplingNatureEnum

TimeseriesMetadata.description: The sidecar metadata document for one timeseries payload file.

anchor_datetime.description: The RFC 9557 datetime (with timezone offset) corresponding to `t` = 0 on the declared clock — the per-session bridge to wall-clock time. Optional here (the session-level record is the source of truth); duplicating it makes the sidecar standalone.
anchor_datetime.title: Anchor Datetime

attempt.description: 1-based attempt number, matching the dataset layout's partition-by-attempt convention (`response_1.csv` ↔ `mouse_1.ndjson`).
attempt.title: Attempt

byte_length.description: Size of the payload file in bytes (after any content_encoding).
byte_length.title: Byte Length

channels.description: Definitions of the payload's channels, in payload column order. For self-describing payloads (e.g. EDF) this list mirrors the labels/units consumers need without parsing the container format.
channels.title: Channels

clock.description: URI of the clock every `t` value is on. Defaults to the vocabulary `engine_seconds` term: a monotonic per-session clock counting seconds since engine start.
clock.title: Clock

content_encoding.description: Optional transport encoding of the payload file, e.g. `gzip`. Absent means the payload is stored uncompressed.
content_encoding.title: Content Encoding

content_url.description: Where the payload file lives: a relative path resolved against this sidecar's own location (payload and sidecar normally sit side by side in the activity folder), or an absolute URL.
content_url.title: Content Url

description.description: Human-readable description of what was recorded and how.
description.title: Description

name.description: Short machine-friendly name of the series (e.g. `mouse_trajectory`, `gaze`, `eeg`).
name.title: Name

nominal_rate_hz.description: Nominal sampling rate in Hz. Required when `sampling_nature` is `sampled`; meaningless (omit) when `event_driven`.
nominal_rate_hz.title: Nominal Rate Hz

sampling_nature.description: Whether samples are event-driven (irregular) or taken at a nominal fixed rate.
sampling_nature.title: Sampling Nature

session_uuid.description: UUID of the session this series was recorded in (see the trial schema's `session_uuid`). Lets a sidecar be interpreted standalone, outside the dataset folder hierarchy.
session_uuid.title: Session Uuid

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the payload file's bytes (after any content_encoding), lowercase hex. Recommended for integrity checking.
sha256.title: Sha256

type.description: Discriminator for the document kind; always `bdm:Timeseries`.
type.title: Type

TimeseriesMetadata.title: TimeseriesMetadata
